result.name: Time dilation (offensive)
result.description: Level: 1d6 Effect: For the next twenty-four hours, when the user makes a melee attack, they move at almost instantaneous speed, easing their attacks by two steps (three steps if the cypher is level 6 or higher).

sections.name: Time dilation (offensive)
